_comment: Maps Claude Code hook events → Codex hook events. Used by translate.js when porting hooks.json. Last verified against Codex docs 2026-04-24.

PreToolUse.note: Codex fires for Bash, apply_patch, MCP tool calls. ApplyPatchHandler bug exists per openai/codex#16732.

SubagentStop.note: Codex returns subagent results to parent context — no separate stop event. Fold logic into Stop or drop.

Notification.note: No Codex equivalent. macOS notification handlers must move to launchd or a separate daemon.

PreCompact.note: Closest analog. Compaction events may not fire — verify before relying on it.

codex_only_events.SessionEnd: Fires when session terminates. Receive PreCompact handlers here.
codex_only_events.PermissionRequest: Fires when Codex asks user to approve a tool. No Claude analog — use as opt-in for security policy.

schema_compat.command_format: Both use { type: 'command', command: '<path>' } — JSON identical.
schema_compat.matcher_field: Both support regex matcher. Use '*' or omit for all events.
schema_compat.stdin_payload: Both pipe JSON to stdin. Field names mostly match. Verify per-event schema in Codex hooks reference.
